title: Kuba's Minerals
description: A mod aimed at expanding Minecraft with new ores with their own unique uses
body:
# KUBA'S MINERALS

### DESCRIPTION
This mod adds new ores and minerals into the game, each with their own uses. It's currently very small as I'm using it to learn modding, but I intend to continue working on it

### CURRENTLY ADDED ORES
- Tin
- Ruby
- Sapphire

### OTHER ADDITIONS
- Right-clicking many metal items/blocks on the top of a lava-filled cauldron will now 'recycle' them, giving back some of the materials invested in crafting.
- Necklaces can be crafting from emerald, sapphire, and ruby to give buffs to the player when worn


_**Adding armour and tool sets for new ores isn't planned in most (if not all) cases as nobody needs new sets in between the existing ones**_
